default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content performance and align on future strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/n3sS5eEYDmgo9mLFWyM8FVAuHv4fdp68?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Performance is strong:** Sessions are on an upward trend, driven by high-intent "scheduling" and "call-offs" keywords, validating the recent shift to specific, use-case-focused content.](https://fathom.video/share/n3sS5eEYDmgo9mLFWyM8FVAuHv4fdp68?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)
  - [**Content strategy is evolving:** The focus will shift from broad topics to granular sub-clusters (e.g., "Call-off Frontline Intelligence") and deep dives into high-performing areas like "call-offs."](https://fathom.video/share/n3sS5eEYDmgo9mLFWyM8FVAuHv4fdp68?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
  - [**December review schedule will accelerate:** To accommodate Jessica's reduced availability, GrowthX will deliver content 1–2 weeks ahead of publishing, enabling batch reviews.](https://fathom.video/share/n3sS5eEYDmgo9mLFWyM8FVAuHv4fdp68?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
  - [**Programmatic content is a future option:** GrowthX's "programmatic" service can generate hundreds of industry-specific pages, a scalable way to build out Yourco's site without using internal engineering resources.](https://fathom.video/share/n3sS5eEYDmgo9mLFWyM8FVAuHv4fdp68?tab=summary&timestamp=1351.0)

## Topics

### Performance Review

  - [**Overall Trend:** Sessions are on a consistent upward trajectory, with a notable spike two weeks ago that GrowthX will investigate to identify the cause.](https://fathom.video/share/n3sS5eEYDmgo9mLFWyM8FVAuHv4fdp68?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)
  - [**Keyword Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/n3sS5eEYDmgo9mLFWyM8FVAuHv4fdp68?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
      - Top 10 keyword rankings are growing, especially \#1 positions.
      - [This growth is expected to continue fueling session increases.](https://fathom.video/share/n3sS5eEYDmgo9mLFWyM8FVAuHv4fdp68?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
  - [**Driver Analysis:**](https://fathom.video/share/n3sS5eEYDmgo9mLFWyM8FVAuHv4fdp68?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)
      - [Growth is concentrated in high-intent keywords: "scheduling" and "call-offs."](https://fathom.video/share/n3sS5eEYDmgo9mLFWyM8FVAuHv4fdp68?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)
      - [This validates the recent strategy shift from broad topics to specific use cases.](https://fathom.video/share/n3sS5eEYDmgo9mLFWyM8FVAuHv4fdp68?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)

### Content Strategy & Pipeline

  - [**Pipeline Flexibility:** GrowthX will reserve one slot in the 4-week-out schedule to accommodate urgent topics from Yourco without disrupting the plan.](https://fathom.video/share/n3sS5eEYDmgo9mLFWyM8FVAuHv4fdp68?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
  - [**Content Merging:**](https://fathom.video/share/n3sS5eEYDmgo9mLFWyM8FVAuHv4fdp68?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
      - [Current content is being merged to eliminate keyword overlap and ensure each article is comprehensive and distinct.](https://fathom.video/share/n3sS5eEYDmgo9mLFWyM8FVAuHv4fdp68?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
      - [This process is more time-intensive but will improve content quality.](https://fathom.video/share/n3sS5eEYDmgo9mLFWyM8FVAuHv4fdp68?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
  - [**Frontline Intelligence Sub-clusters:**](https://fathom.video/share/n3sS5eEYDmgo9mLFWyM8FVAuHv4fdp68?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
      - [Strategy will shift from broad topics to granular sub-clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/n3sS5eEYDmgo9mLFWyM8FVAuHv4fdp68?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
      - [**Goal:** Create dedicated content for each product feature (e.g., "Call-off Frontline Intelligence," "Survey Frontline Intelligence") to build out a complete content cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/n3sS5eEYDmgo9mLFWyM8FVAuHv4fdp68?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
  - [**Deep Dive: "Call-offs" Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/n3sS5eEYDmgo9mLFWyM8FVAuHv4fdp68?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
      - [The high performance of "call-offs" content (e.g., "how to respond when an employee gets sick") signals strong HR leader interest.](https://fathom.video/share/n3sS5eEYDmgo9mLFWyM8FVAuHv4fdp68?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
      - [**Action:** Create more content addressing specific HR pain points around call-offs.](https://fathom.video/share/n3sS5eEYDmgo9mLFWyM8FVAuHv4fdp68?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
      - [**Research:** GrowthX will use its AI search prompts (scrunch) to find HR-specific questions, as Reddit is employee-focused.](https://fathom.video/share/n3sS5eEYDmgo9mLFWyM8FVAuHv4fdp68?tab=summary&timestamp=558.0)
  - [**Annual Trends Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/n3sS5eEYDmgo9mLFWyM8FVAuHv4fdp68?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)
      - [GrowthX will review 2025 trend articles.](https://fathom.video/share/n3sS5eEYDmgo9mLFWyM8FVAuHv4fdp68?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)
      - [**Decision:** Refresh high-performing articles for 2026; let low-performing ones expire.](https://fathom.video/share/n3sS5eEYDmgo9mLFWyM8FVAuHv4fdp68?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)

### Logistics & Future Opportunities

  - [**December Review Schedule:**](https://fathom.video/share/n3sS5eEYDmgo9mLFWyM8FVAuHv4fdp68?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
      - [**Problem:** Jessica's reduced availability in December (1 day/week) creates a risk of content pipeline delays.](https://fathom.video/share/n3sS5eEYDmgo9mLFWyM8FVAuHv4fdp68?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
      - [**Solution:** GrowthX will accelerate delivery to be 1–2 weeks ahead of publishing, allowing Jessica to review and publish in a single batch.](https://fathom.video/share/n3sS5eEYDmgo9mLFWyM8FVAuHv4fdp68?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
  - [**Table Implementation:**](https://fathom.video/share/n3sS5eEYDmgo9mLFWyM8FVAuHv4fdp68?tab=summary&timestamp=1803.0)
      - [The new table feature will be implemented in the next 1–2 weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/n3sS5eEYDmgo9mLFWyM8FVAuHv4fdp68?tab=summary&timestamp=1803.0)
      - [**Plan:** Use images for comparison tables now, then update articles (e.g., the Beekeeper comparison) with the native feature later.](https://fathom.video/share/n3sS5eEYDmgo9mLFWyM8FVAuHv4fdp68?tab=summary&timestamp=1803.0)
  - [**Programmatic Content (Future Option):**](https://fathom.video/share/n3sS5eEYDmgo9mLFWyM8FVAuHv4fdp68?tab=summary&timestamp=1351.0)
      - [GrowthX's "programmatic" service can generate hundreds of industry-specific pages using a custom template and deep research.](https://fathom.video/share/n3sS5eEYDmgo9mLFWyM8FVAuHv4fdp68?tab=summary&timestamp=1351.0)
      - [**Benefit:** A scalable way to build out Yourco's site (e.g., "Pulse surveys for manufacturing") without using internal engineering resources.](https://fathom.video/share/n3sS5eEYDmgo9mLFWyM8FVAuHv4fdp68?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX (Carrie):**](https://fathom.video/share/n3sS5eEYDmgo9mLFWyM8FVAuHv4fdp68?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
      - [Deliver remaining content for next week by EOD today.](https://fathom.video/share/n3sS5eEYDmgo9mLFWyM8FVAuHv4fdp68?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
      - [Investigate the cause of the recent session spike.](https://fathom.video/share/n3sS5eEYDmgo9mLFWyM8FVAuHv4fdp68?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
      - [Review 2025 trend articles and recommend refresh/retire decisions.](https://fathom.video/share/n3sS5eEYDmgo9mLFWyM8FVAuHv4fdp68?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)
      - [Accelerate the content review schedule for December.](https://fathom.video/share/n3sS5eEYDmgo9mLFWyM8FVAuHv4fdp68?tab=summary&timestamp=886.0)
      - [Research HR-specific "call-offs" questions using AI prompts to generate new content ideas.](https://fathom.video/share/n3sS5eEYDmgo9mLFWyM8FVAuHv4fdp68?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
  - [**Yourco (Jessica):**](https://fathom.video/share/n3sS5eEYDmgo9mLFWyM8FVAuHv4fdp68?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
      - [Review next week's content today.](https://fathom.video/share/n3sS5eEYDmgo9mLFWyM8FVAuHv4fdp68?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)

action_items.description: Analyze recent traffic spike; report findings to Jessica
Leave 1 open slot in 4-weeks-out content schedule for Jessica adds
Review Scrunch prompts; compile HR call-off Qs; share w/ Jessica
Review 2025 trend articles; recommend refresh to 2026 or retire; inform Jessica
Check Scrunch AI Search Trends brand presence; update Jessica
Align w/ Joe; speed reviews to 1–2 weeks ahead; deliver 2 weeks of content to Jessica by EOW
Add comparison table to Beekeeper article after table component live
